name: ERNIE 4.0
note: GPT-4-class flagship unveiled at Baidu World 2023; superseded by ERNIE 4.0 Turbo (2024, priced CNY12-20/M tokens) and later ERNIE 4.5/5.0.

results.notes: SuperCLUE 2023 Annual Report, 百度文心一言4.0 (API), ranked #1 among domestic Chinese models (vs GPT-4-Turbo 90.63, GPT-4-Web 83.92). Independently corroborated by sohu.com/a/748415134_121124334. Found during round-7 widened search but not merged at the time since the superclue taxonomy slug did not yet exist; backfilled once it was introduced.

verificationNotes: Existence and Oct 17, 2023 release date (Baidu World 2023 keynote) confirmed via Voicebot.ai, PRNewswire, and CNBC coverage, all dated Oct 17-18 2023 reporting the same-day/previous-day launch — exact match to the given releaseDate. paramsB correctly left null; undisclosed in every source found. No specific benchmark result rows were present in the original record, so none were added (avoiding unverified numbers).
